source: FAST Book Part II — Federal Account Symbols and Titles
publisher: Bureau of the Fiscal Service, U.S. Department of the Treasury
description: Reference data for mapping appropriation provisions to Treasury Account Symbols. Each entry is a Federal Account Symbol (FAS) — the agency code + main account code that identifies an appropriation account as established by Congress. FAS codes are stable through account renames and persist for the life of the account. Use the 'general' fund_type entries for matching provisions in appropriations bills.
